outputQuality.metric: source hit rate on representative grounded cases

endToEndTaskSuccess.metric: expected grounding status plus expected source when applicable

upstreamRetrieval.metric: hit@4 for cases with expected source/category

upstreamTransformation.detail: finalArticles must equal the stored article array length and be no larger than normalized/deduped counts.

cases.message: What are the AI or cyber security headlines?
cases.metricReason: A technology/security question should retrieve a technology story instead of only the newest headlines.
